dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend EventId = tostring(event.id), EventType = tostring(event['type']), Module = tostring(event.module), RiskLevel = tostring(event.risk_level), AssetType = case(isnotempty(tostring(event.asset['type'])), tostring(event.asset['type']), isnotempty(tostring(event.source_type)), tostring(event.source_type), ''), AssetValue = case(isnotempty(tostring(event.asset['value'])), tostring(event.asset['value']), isnotempty(tostring(event.asset_value)), tostring(event.asset_value), ''), Tags = event['tags'], TimeGenerated = iif(isnotempty(tostring(event.date_added)), todatetime(event.date_added), iif(isnotempty(tostring(event.detected_at)), todatetime(event.detected_at), iif(isnotempty(['time']), todatetime(['time']), now()))), Details = event | project TimeGenerated, EventId, EventType, Module, RiskLevel, AssetType, AssetValue, Tags, Details
